context: Tests whether the ios-networking skill distinguishes background URLSession upload/download transfers from WebSocket realtime networking and handles lifecycle constraints accurately.

checklist.name: Transfer Scope
checklist.description: States that background URLSession is for HTTP/HTTPS upload and download transfers, not WebSocket durability or arbitrary JSON polling via data tasks.

checklist.name: File-Backed Uploads
checklist.description: States that background uploads must be file-backed and that in-memory Data or stream uploads are not the durable background pattern after app exit.

checklist.name: Delegate Pattern
checklist.description: Requires a delegate and task-based APIs for background sessions rather than async convenience APIs as the durable transfer pattern.

checklist.name: Force Quit Limit
checklist.description: Explains that user force-quit cancels background transfers and prevents automatic relaunch until the user opens the app.

checklist.name: Downloaded File Handling
checklist.description: Requires moving or opening a downloaded temporary file before urlSession(_:downloadTask:didFinishDownloadingTo:) returns.

checklist.name: WebSocket Boundary
checklist.description: Keeps WebSocket guidance to foreground/default-session realtime networking with reconnect behavior rather than promising background receipt after suspension or force-quit.

checklist.name: Scope Control
checklist.description: Keeps the review focused on networking lifecycle and transfer behavior rather than redesigning chat features or notification UI.
